ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wines" (
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wine */,
  "cultivar" TEXT /* Type of grape used for the wine */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the wine was produced */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of production */,
  "winemaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winemaker responsible for the wine */,
  "cultivar_variety" TEXT /* Specific variety of the cultivar */,
  "vineyard" TEXT /* Name of the vineyard where the grapes are grown */,
  "bottle_size" TEXT /* Size of the bottles in which the wine is sold */,
  "bottle_count" INTEGER /* Number of bottles produced */,
  "aging_time" INTEGER /* Time the wine has been aged (in months) */,
  "sustainability_certification" TEXT /* Any sustainability certifications the wine has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_winemaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("winemaker_id") REFERENCES winemakers ("winemaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chemical_compositions" (
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chemical composition record */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wine for which these compositions were measured */,
  "alcohol" REAL /* Alcohol content of the wine */,
  "malic_acid" REAL /* Malic acid content of the wine */,
  "ash" REAL /* Ash content of the wine */,
  "alkalinity" REAL /* Alkalinity of the wine */,
  "magnesium" REAL /* Magnesium content of the wine */,
  "total_phenols" REAL /* Total phenolic compounds in the wine */,
  "flavonoids" REAL /* Flavonoid content of the wine */,
  "nonflavonoids" REAL /* Non-flavonoid content of the wine */,
  "proanthocyanins" REAL /* Proanthocyanins content in the wine */,
  "color_intensity" REAL /* Color intensity of the wine */,
  "hue" REAL /* Hue of the wine */,
  "od280_rat" REAL /* OD280 ratio of the wine */,
  "proline" REAL /* Proline content of the wine */,
  "volatile_acidity" REAL /* Volatile acidity content of the wine */,
  "chlorides" REAL /* Chlorides content of the wine */,
  "free_sulfur_dioxide" REAL /* Free sulfur dioxide content of the wine */,
  "total_sulfur_dioxide" REAL /* Total sulfur dioxide content of the wine */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the wine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("composition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chemical_compositions_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "winemakers" (
  "winemaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each winemaker */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the winemaker */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the winemaker */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the winemaker is based */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience the winemaker has */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* The winemaker's area of expertise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("winemaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wine being assessed */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assessment */,
  "score" REAL /* Quality score assigned to the wine */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes on the quality of the wine */,
  "taster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the taster who performed the assessment */,
  "aroma_score" REAL /* Separate score for the aroma */,
  "flavor_score" REAL /* Separate score for the flavor */,
  "finish_score" REAL /* Separate score for the finish */,
  "visual_score" REAL /* Separate score for the visual appearance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_assessments_taster_id FOREIGN KEY ("taster_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_assessments_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasting_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tasting note */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wine being tasted */,
  "tasting_date" TEXT /* Date of the tasting */,
  "aroma" TEXT /* Aroma description */,
  "flavor" TEXT /* Flavor description */,
  "finish" TEXT /* Finish description */,
  "overall_impression" TEXT /* Overall impression of the wine */,
  "taster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the taster who recorded the notes */,
  "texture" TEXT /* Description of the wine's texture */,
  "acidity" TEXT /* Description of the wine's acidity level */,
  "tannin" TEXT /* Description of the wine's tannin level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasting_notes_taster_id FOREIGN KEY ("taster_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasting_notes_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region's climate and soil type */,
  "average_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature of the region */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Average precipitation in the region */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the region (in meters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vintages" (
  "vintage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vintage record */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wine associated with this vintage */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vintage */,
  "harvest_date" TEXT /* Date when the grapes were harvested */,
  "yield" REAL /* Yield of grapes produced (in tons) */,
  "quality_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the quality of the vintage */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Description of the weather conditions during the growing season */,
  "disease_incidence" TEXT /* Incidence of diseases in the vineyard during the vintage year */,
  "pest_incidence" TEXT /* Incidence of pests in the vineyard during the vintage year */,
  "harvest_method" TEXT /* Method of harvest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vintage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vintages_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., winemaker, sommelier, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions the user has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "storage_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each storage condition record */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wine being stored */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Storage temperature (in Celsius) */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Storage humidity (percentage) */,
  "light_exposure" TEXT /* Light exposure level (e.g., dark, low, bright) */,
  "storage_time" INTEGER /* Time the wine has been stored (in months) */,
  "bottle_position" TEXT /* Position of the bottles during storage */,
  "storage_location" TEXT /* Location where the wine is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_storage_conditions_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale record */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wine sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity sold */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated from the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who purchased the wine */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Sales channel */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the sale (in percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating record */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rated wine */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who rated the wine */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given to the wine (1 to 5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment from the user about the wine */,
  "taster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the taster who gave the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_taster_id FOREIGN KEY ("taster_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
